title: GiveMeSomeLight
description: GiveMeSomeLight is a minecraft Fabric mod that give you light if you holding torch for exempel
body:
GiveMeSomeLight

### - [Features] - You can see in the dark if you hold a torch in your left or right hand and all items that emit light when placed. Light list [Here](https://github.com/DeluxerPanda/GiveMeSomeLight/blob/master/Light-list.md) ### - [Dependence] - Fabric API
